pr.title: French i18n, language switcher, toasts, and shift delete
pr.body: ## Summary Implements priority items 1–3 from the improvement roadmap. ### 1. French + language switcher - Added `fr-FR` locale file - **Browser language detection** via `i18next-browser-languagedetector`: maps `en*`, `pt*`, `fr*` to supported languages; **defaults to English** when no match - User choice persisted in `localStorage` - **LanguageSwitcher** dropdown (English / Português / Français) with checkmark on active language - FullCalendar uses `pt-br` and `fr` locale packs ### 2. Internationalization for errors & toasts - All API success/error messages use `t('notifications.*')` - Wired `useToast()` — green success / red error toasts bottom-right - Removed inline error text under the team form ### 3. Delete shifts - **Edit dialog:** Delete button → inline confirm → removes shift - **Calendar:** Hover the last segment of a bar → red X for quick delete (with confirm) ## Testing - `npm run build` — pass - `npm run lint` — pass
pr.author: drenlia
